title: Financial Overview
description: Overview of your financial status with net worth, assets, liabilities, and breakdowns

widgets.title: Net Worth
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(CASE WHEN account_type IN ('Assets', 'Liabilities') THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS amount FROM postings GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Total Assets
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Assets' GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Total Liabilities
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) * -1 AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Liabilities' GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Assets Breakdown
widgets.helpText: Only shows accounts with a positive balance. Accounts with negative balances (e.g. overdrawn) are excluded since pie charts cannot display negative values.
widgets.query: SELECT CASE WHEN account LIKE 'Assets:Liquid:%' THEN REPLACE(account, 'Assets:Liquid:', '') WHEN account LIKE 'Assets:Investments:%' THEN REPLACE(account, 'Assets:Investments:', '') ELSE REPLACE(account, 'Assets:', '') END AS name, account, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS value FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Assets' AND currency = :currency GROUP BY account HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC

widgets.title: Liabilities Breakdown
widgets.helpText: Only shows accounts with outstanding balances. Accounts with negative balances (e.g. overpayment or refund) are excluded since pie charts cannot display negative values.
widgets.query: SELECT REPLACE(account, 'Liabilities:', '') AS name, account, ROUND(SUM(amount) * -1, 2) AS value FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Liabilities' AND currency = :currency GROUP BY account HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC
